news.title: How major US stock indexes fared Tuesday 7/21/2026
news.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 0.7%, and the Nasdaq composite climbed 1.3%. news.title: Market strategist says it's a 'really good time' to consider gold
news.description:
STORY: Gold rose more than 1% on Tuesday on hopes of a diplomatic breakthrough between the U.S. and Iran, which could ease energy prices and temper expectations of a hawkish Federal Reserve.
